rules.current_observed_value: GLD 10 shares around 387.700 after two completed five-share reductions
rules.trigger_condition: If GLD falls below 385, reduce 5. If GLD falls below 380, consider clearing the remaining 5. Downgrade alert after 400-405 recovery.
rules.trigger_level: 385 first residual protection / 380 final review / 400-405 recovery
rules.intended_action: hold residual 10 under staged downside protection
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: broker order record and post-sale holdings screenshot
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not classify the completed first two tranches as non-execution.

rules.current_observed_value: NVDA 15 shares around 206.427 after one completed five-share reduction
rules.trigger_condition: If below 200 with weak QQQ/SMH, reduce another 5. If 210-212 is reclaimed for 30-60 minutes, hold. No buyback yet.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: broker order record and post-sale holdings screenshot
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Separate imperfect price outcome from compliance.

rules.trigger_condition: If GOOG breaks 355 and cannot reclaim, sell 5 GGLL. If GOOG falls below 350, clear remaining GGLL.
rules.intended_action: hold GOOG 14 and monitor GGLL as the main leveraged-risk valve
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: regular-session executable quote and order-detail screenshot
